name: tensor
description: Header-only C++20/23 library — the canonical reference for differentiable named-axis tensor computation in modern C++ (ADR-0013).

webgpu.description: Enables the WebGPU KernelBackend adapter. Pulls in Dawn via vcpkg (ADR-0014). Requires opting into a baseline that includes dawn@20260410.140140+ — the project's default builtin-baseline does not. Activate via `vcpkg install --x-feature=webgpu` after overriding the baseline, e.g. `--x-manifest-root=. --x-builtin-ports-root-dir=<vcpkg>/ports`. The actual gpu.cpp + Dawn dispatch wiring lands in P3.M3.2 / P3.M4.2 (see docs/detailed-design/webgpu-element-wise-kernels.md and docs/detailed-design/webgpu-gemm-kernel.md); until then this feature exists as a forward-declaration of the intent captured in ADR-0014 so downstream tooling can discover the dependency shape.
